title: Planning is content-general: a validation-feature plan emits a sound DAG (the integration test depends on the impl + config units and is marked ordered) — proving plan-lint has no rate-limit knowledge

input.intent: Reject overly long URLs on the shorten endpoint with a 400 + JSON error so the store never persists garbage.

plan.intent: Reject overly long URLs on the shorten endpoint with a 400 + JSON error so the store never persists garbage.

units.title: integration test (POST an over-long url; asserts 400 + JSON error; nothing stored)
